title: Subscription & billing
subtitle: Manage your plan, payment methods, and billing.
paymentMethodHint: Add a card in the billing portal to activate or keep your subscription.
managePortalDesc: Update card, download invoices, or cancel subscription.
changeViaPortal: Changes are handled via the secure Stripe portal.
downgradeHint: Downgrade from the billing portal (effective at period end).
changePlanDesc: Update your card, switch plans, or cancel in a few clicks via the Stripe portal.
proIntentBanner: You selected Pro — complete payment below to unlock all features.
alreadyProPortal: You already have an active subscription. Opening billing portal…

sim.banner: Simulated billing is active. Test Pro, cards, and plan changes without Stripe.
sim.checkoutDesc: Confirm to activate Pro as in production, without charging a card.
sim.portalDesc: Change plan, update card, or cancel — no Stripe required.

notConfiguredDesc: Stripe billing is not configured on this environment yet. Contact support to enable Pro manually.
checkoutSuccess: Payment confirmed. Your Pro plan will be active shortly.
checkoutCancel: Payment canceled. No changes were applied.
